title: Specialist Customer Insights / Marktforschung (m/w/d)
required_skills: Degree in BWL, Psychology, or Sociology with market research focus
Fundierte Berufserfahrung in market research / consumer insights
Very good German — written and spoken
MS Office and analysis tools experience
bonus_skills: Coordination with external market research vendors
matched_skills: Business degree (Master of Management — adequate substitute for BWL)
Market research and consumer insights experience (ECE Group competitive analysis, IPC voice-of-customer)
missing_skills: Very good German (sehr gut) — CV shows B1+ which may be insufficient
Telgte (near Münster) location — on-site up to 40% required
Formal market research methodology (quant/qual research design)
core_responsibilities: Plan and conduct market research concepts across departments
Desk research and support quantitative/qualitative studies
Data preparation, analysis, and deriving recommendations
Regular reports and summaries of market research data for business reviews
Identify target group potentials and profiles from market research data
recommended_emphasis: Lead with market research and consumer insights from pdm CV (voice-of-customer, competitive analysis)
Frame ECE Group competitive analysis and IPC customer segmentation as consumer insights work
State German level honestly (B1+) — 'sehr gut' requirement may be an issue
Telgte location near Münster — confirm user's willingness to commute/relocate
Fashion retail experience absent — position as analytical generalist

company_info.size_raw: Takko Fashion: 2,744 LinkedIn employees, retail company 10,001+
